title: Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure Is Already Battered
summary_full: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.
summary_public: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.

IL.label: negative
